jmdict-min.json — compact Japanese→English glosses

Derived from JMdict (the common-words English subset, jmdict-eng-common) via
the jmdict-simplified project (https://github.com/scriptin/jmdict-simplified).

JMdict is the property of the Electronic Dictionary Research and Development
Group (EDRDG) and is used in conformance with its license:
https://www.edrdg.org/edrdg/licence.html (Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike
4.0 International — CC BY-SA 4.0).

This file maps each headword (kanji and kana forms) to a shortened gloss
(first glosses of up to three senses) for in-app lookups. The full dictionary
is at https://www.edrdg.org/jmdict/edict_doc.html
